summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster and provides no shared canonical, so each open PR is classified independently. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or raise-PR action is recommended from this shard.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR with its own config bug scope and no hydrated duplicate or superseding canonical in this shard; keep it independent for normal maintainer/author follow-up.
Standalone large UI feature PR with failing proof and no duplicate/superseding canonical in the hydrated shard; keep it independent rather than closing from inventory cleanup.
Standalone risky-infra script PR with failing artifact check and no hydrated duplicate or replacement path; keep it independent for normal review rather than mutating.
Focused useful PR that appears ready for maintainer review, but this inventory shard cannot merge or close linked issues and should not invent a canonical. Keep it independent.
Standalone auth-provider-adjacent config PR with useful contributor work and no hydrated duplicate/superseding canonical; keep it independent for maintainer/author review.
